title: Senior Sales Executive, Regional role
description:
Key Responsibilities

•        Achieve assigned annual revenue and bookings targets through direct customer engagement and distributor collaboration.

•        Manage the complete sales cycle - from opportunity identification, technical presentation, quotation, and negotiation to contract closure and handover.

•        Ensure customer satisfaction and timely follow-up on delivery, installation, and after-sales support.

•         Identify new market opportunities for Company’s non-solar products (semiconductor, and precision laser equipment, etc.) across Southeast Asia, India, Korea, Japan, and Europe.

•        Conduct market and competitor analyses to support regional strategy formulation.

•        Channel and Partner Management - Establish and maintain relationships with key regional distributors, OEM partners, and strategic accounts.

•        Work closely with potential collaborators to expand Company’s reach in relevant territories.

•        Develop regional sales strategies aligned with company objectives and report on pipeline progress, forecast accuracy, and market trends.

•        Contribute feedback to headquarters and BUs on pricing, product positioning, and market demand.

•        Liaise with R&D and Technical teams to tailor solutions that meet customer requirements.

•         Participate in trade shows to strengthen brand visibility.

•        Willingness to travel regionally ;self-motivated, goal-oriented, and capable of working independently.

How to Apply:

Interested applicants, kindly click on “APPLY NOW”

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
postedCompany.name: TRUST RECRUIT PTE. LTD.
